type: SURVEY
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Adding fallback_searchpath param to FileSystemLoader: __init__ (new param + storage), get_source() (search fallback paths after primary), list_templates() (include fallback templates)

type: SURVEY
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Adding optional path_transform param (callable str->str) to BaseLoader.__init__ and all loader __init__ methods: FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader. Will apply self.path_transform(template) at top of get_source (and PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader load()) before resolution, wrapping TemplateNotFound to preserve original name. Touches __init__ signatures and get_source/load bodies of all loader classes.

type: DRAFT
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
region: FileSystemLoader.__init__
code:     def __init__(
        self,
        searchpath: t.Union[str, os.PathLike, t.Sequence[t.Union[str, os.PathLike]]],
        encoding: str = "utf-8",
        followlinks: bool = False,
        fallback_searchpath: t.Union[
            str, os.PathLike, t.Sequence[t.Union[str, os.PathLike]], None
        ] = None,
        path_transform: t.Optional[t.Callable[[str], str]] = None,
    ) -> None:
        if not isinstance(searchpath, abc.Iterable) or isinstance(searchpath, str):
            searchpath = [searchpath]

        self.searchpath = [os.fspath(p) for p in searchpath]
        self.encoding = encoding
        self.followlinks = followlinks

        if fallback_searchpath is None:
            fallback_searchpath = []
        elif not isinstance(fallback_searchpath, abc.Iterable) or isinstance(
            fallback_searchpath, str
        ):
            fallback_searchpath = [fallback_searchpath]

        self.fallback_searchpath = [os.fspath(p) for p in fallback_searchpath]
        self.path_transform = path_transform
note: Proposed merged __init__: my path_transform param + your fallback_searchpath param, both optional, both after followlinks. Let me know if your fallback_searchpath param name/shape differs.

files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
region: FileSystemLoader.__init__
code: def __init__(
        self,
        searchpath: t.Union[str, os.PathLike, t.Sequence[t.Union[str, os.PathLike]]],
        encoding: str = "utf-8",
        followlinks: bool = False,
        fallback_searchpath: t.Optional[
            t.Union[str, os.PathLike, t.Sequence[t.Union[str, os.PathLike]]]
        ] = None,
        path_transform: t.Optional[t.Callable[[str], str]] = None,
    ) -> None:
        super().__init__(path_transform)

        if not isinstance(searchpath, abc.Iterable) or isinstance(searchpath, str):
            searchpath = [searchpath]

        self.searchpath = [os.fspath(p) for p in searchpath]

        if fallback_searchpath is None:
            fallback_searchpath = []
        elif not isinstance(fallback_searchpath, abc.Iterable) or isinstance(
            fallback_searchpath, str
        ):
            fallback_searchpath = [fallback_searchpath]

        self.fallback_searchpath = [os.fspath(p) for p in fallback_searchpath]
        self.encoding = encoding
        self.followlinks = followlinks
note: Assumes BaseLoader.__init__(self, path_transform=None) sets self.path_transform. fallback_searchpath param placed before path_transform for readability but order open to adjust.

type: DRAFT
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
region: FileSystemLoader.get_source
code: def get_source(
        self, environment: "Environment", template: str
    ) -> t.Tuple[str, str, t.Callable[[], bool]]:
        if self.path_transform:
            template = self.path_transform(template)

        pieces = split_template_path(template)

        for searchpath in [*self.searchpath, *self.fallback_searchpath]:
            filename = os.path.join(searchpath, *pieces)
            f = open_if_exists(filename)
            if f is None:
                continue
            try:
                contents = f.read().decode(self.encoding)
            finally:
                f.close()

            mtime = os.path.getmtime(filename)

            def uptodate() -> bool:
                try:
                    return os.path.getmtime(filename) == mtime
                except OSError:
                    return False

            return contents, filename, uptodate
        raise TemplateNotFound(template)
note: Combines primary+fallback search order with path_transform applied once at top before split_template_path.

type: DRAFT
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
region: FileSystemLoader.get_source
code:     def get_source(
        self, environment: "Environment", template: str
    ) -> t.Tuple[str, str, t.Callable[[], bool]]:
        original_template = template

        if self.path_transform is not None:
            template = self.path_transform(template)

        pieces = split_template_path(template)

        for searchpath in chain(self.searchpath, self.fallback_searchpath):
            filename = os.path.join(searchpath, *pieces)
            f = open_if_exists(filename)
            if f is None:
                continue
            try:
                contents = f.read().decode(self.encoding)
            finally:
                f.close()

            mtime = os.path.getmtime(filename)

            def uptodate() -> bool:
                try:
                    return os.path.getmtime(filename) == mtime
                except OSError:
                    return False

            return contents, filename, uptodate
        raise TemplateNotFound(original_template)
note: Uses itertools.chain over searchpath+fallback_searchpath (your feature). path_transform applied before split_template_path; original_template preserved for the final TemplateNotFound so error messages show the untransformed name. Requires 'from itertools import chain' import added near top.

region: FileSystemLoader.__init__, FileSystemLoader.get_source (correcting stale reference)
code:     def __init__(
        self,
        searchpath: t.Union[str, os.PathLike, t.Sequence[t.Union[str, os.PathLike]]],
        encoding: str = "utf-8",
        followlinks: bool = False,
        fallback_searchpath: t.Union[
            str, os.PathLike, t.Sequence[t.Union[str, os.PathLike]], None
        ] = None,
        path_transform: t.Optional[t.Callable[[str], str]] = None,
    ) -> None:
        if not isinstance(searchpath, abc.Iterable) or isinstance(searchpath, str):
            searchpath = [searchpath]

        self.searchpath = [os.fspath(p) for p in searchpath]
        self.encoding = encoding
        self.followlinks = followlinks

        if fallback_searchpath is None:
            fallback_searchpath = []
        elif not isinstance(fallback_searchpath, abc.Iterable) or isinstance(
            fallback_searchpath, str
        ):
            fallback_searchpath = [fallback_searchpath]

        self.fallback_searchpath = [os.fspath(p) for p in fallback_searchpath]
        self.path_transform = path_transform

    def get_source(
        self, environment: "Environment", template: str
    ) -> t.Tuple[str, str, t.Callable[[], bool]]:
        original_template = template

        if self.path_transform:
            template = self.path_transform(template)

        pieces = split_template_path(template)

        for searchpath in [*self.searchpath, *self.fallback_searchpath]:
            filename = os.path.join(searchpath, *pieces)
            f = open_if_exists(filename)
            if f is None:
                continue
            try:
                contents = f.read().decode(self.encoding)
            finally:
                f.close()

            mtime = os.path.getmtime(filename)

            def uptodate() -> bool:
                try:
                    return os.path.getmtime(filename) == mtime
                except OSError:
                    return False

            return contents, filename, uptodate
        raise TemplateNotFound(original_template)
note: IMPORTANT correction: your last message referenced the super()/itertools.chain version, but that was superseded - your own 23:05:32 and 23:05:37 messages (crossed in transit with mine) already reverted to this NO-super, list-concat, truthy-check version. code:     def __init__(
        self,
        searchpath: t.Union[str, os.PathLike, t.Sequence[t.Union[str, os.PathLike]]],
        encoding: str = "utf-8",

            searchpath = [searchpath]

        self.searchpath = [os.fspath(p) for p in searchpath]
        self.encoding = encoding
        self.followlinks = followlinks

        if fallback_searchpath is None:
            fallback_searchpath = []
        elif not isinstance(fallback_searchpath, abc.Iterable) or isinstance(
            fallback_searchpath, str
        ):
            fallback_searchpath = [fallback_searchpath]

        self.fallback_searchpath = [os.fspath(p) for p in fallback_searchpath]
        self.path_transform = path_transform

    def get_source(
        self, environment: "Environment", template: str
    ) -> t.Tuple[str, str, t.Callable[[], bool]]:
        original_template = template

        if self.path_transform:
            template = self.path_transform(template)

        pieces = split_template_path(template)

        for searchpath in [*self.searchpath, *self.fallback_searchpath]:
            filename = os.path.join(searchpath, *pieces)
            f = open_if_exists(filename)
            if f is None:
                continue
            try:
                contents = f.read().decode(self.encoding)
            finally:
                f.close()

            mtime = os.path.getmtime(filename)

            def uptodate() -> bool:
                try:
                    return os.path.getmtime(filename) == mtime
                except OSError:
                    return False

            return contents, filename, uptodate
        raise TemplateNotFound(original_template)
